name: Unique Veterinary Prescription Diet Adult Cat Obesity Chicken & Turkey 2kg
description: How it works: Weight control with limited metabolic energy level, Rich and effective fiber content (healthy digestion), High L-Carnitine (effective use of energy), Probiotic and prebiotic rich content, High quality protein sources. Ingredients: Chicken Protein, Turkey Protein, Pea, Pea Protein, Powdered Cellulose, Sugar Beet Pulp, Fish Oil, Chicken Oil, Hydrolysed Chicken Liver, Vitamin and Mineral Premix, Natural Flavours, Brewer's Yeast, Probiotic, Psyllium Shells, Dried Algae, MOS, Glucan, Tocopherol, Marigold Extract, Yucca, Wild Sea buckthorn. Raw Material Components Raw Protein 42.10% Raw oil 9.60% Raw Cellulose (Fiber) 8.60% Ash 6.84% Moisture 4.20% Omega-3 0.48% Omega 6 1.30% Calcium 1.20% Phosphorus 0.90% Sodium 0.27% Magnesium 0.062% Potassium 0.50% Nutritional Supplements Vitamin A (3a672a) 25,000 IU/kg Vitamin D 3 (E671) 850 IU/kg Vitamin E (3a700) 1.000 mg/kg Vitamin C (3a312) 300mg/kg Choline Chloride (3a890) 2.300 mg/kg Biotin (3a880) 3mg/kg Vitamin B 1 (3a821) 10mg/kg Vitamin B2 30mg/kg Niacinamide (3a315) 60mg/kg Calcium-D-Panthothenate (3a841) 50mg/kg Vitamin B 6 (3a831) 35mg/kg Folic Acid (3a316) 15mg/kg Vitamin B 12 0.15 mg/kg Zinc Chelate of Amino Acids Hydrate (3b606) 110mg/kg Ferrous Chelate of Amino Acids Hydrate (E1) 55mg/kg Manganese Chelate of Amino Acids Hydrate (E5) 35mg/kg Potassium Iodide (3b201) 3mg/kg Cupric Chelate of Amino Acids Hydrate (E4) 3mg/kg Organic Form of Selenium (3b8.10) 0.2mg/kg Taurine (3a370) 2.300 mg/kg L-Carnitine (3a910) 600mg/kg L-Methionine (3c305) 4,000 mg/kg Probiotic (B. Amyloliquefaciens) 7 x 10 14 /kg
